infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Halo Health needs camera access to scan product barcodes and ingredient labels for health analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Halo Health needs microphone access for voice commands and AI coach interactions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Halo Health needs photo library access to save and share product scan results.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Halo Health uses your location to find nearby healthy food options and stores.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This allows us to provide personalized health recommendations and improve your experience.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Halo Health to access your camera to scan product barcodes and ingredient labels.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Halo Health to access your microphone for voice commands and AI coach.
